full_text:
Zhuge Jian
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Jianwas born in Yangdu in Langxie. Son of Zhuge Ke. Attempted to escape to Wei when father was killed. Zhuge Jian was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhuge Jian lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
